revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-065

Early-failure period.

That possible early period, beginning at some stated time, during which the failure rate is decreasing rapidly. 

[[Image:Ch5_Fig1.jpg|400px]]

Figure 1 - Failure rate / time pattern.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
